option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
#!/bin/sh # # Minimal Maven Wrapper bootstrap script. # # This project expects the Maven Wrapper JAR to be present at: # .mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.jar # If it is missing, generate it using a Maven installation: # mvn -N wrapper:wrapper #
BASEDIR=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd) WRAPPER_JAR="$BASEDIR/.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.jar"
if [ ! -f "$WRAPPER_JAR" ]; then echo "Maven Wrapper jar not found. Please ensure .mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.jar exists." exit 1 fi
exec java -classpath "$WRAPPER_JAR" org.apache.maven.wrapper.MavenWrapperMain "$@"

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
<modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>3.2.6</version> <relativePath/> </parent>
<groupId>com.omnischool</groupId> <artifactId>omnischool-backend</artifactId> <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version> <name>OmniSchool Backend</name> <description>OmniSchool - Tunisian school management platform (Spring Boot backend)</description>
<properties> <java.version>17</java.version> <jjwt.version>0.11.5</jjwt.version> </properties>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-mail</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- MySQL driver (XAMPP/MariaDB compatible) --> <dependency> <groupId>com.mysql</groupId> <artifactId>mysql-connector-j</artifactId> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <optional>true</optional> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId> <version>${jjwt.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId> <version>${jjwt.version}</version> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId> <version>${jjwt.version}</version> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
</project>

originalContent
option.value:
spring: datasource: url: jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/omnischool?useSSL=false&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true&serverTimezone=UTC username: ${DB_USERNAME:root} password: ${DB_PASSWORD:} driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver jpa: hibernate: ddl-auto: update show-sql: true properties: hibernate: dialect: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQLDialect mail: host: smtp.gmail.com port: 587 username: ${EMAIL_USERNAME} password: ${EMAIL_PASSWORD} properties.mail.smtp: auth: true starttls.enable: true
jwt: secret: ${JWT_SECRET:omnischool-secret-2024} expiration: 86400000 refresh-expiration: 604800000
app: cors: allowed-origins: http://localhost:5173,https://omnischool.tn
server: port: 8080

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
spring: datasource: url: jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/omnischool?useSSL=false&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true&serverTimezone=UTC username: ${DB_USERNAME:root} password: ${DB_PASSWORD:} driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver jpa: hibernate: ddl-auto: update show-sql: true open-in-view: false mail: host: smtp.gmail.com port: 587 username: ${EMAIL_USERNAME} password: ${EMAIL_PASSWORD} properties.mail.smtp: auth: true starttls.enable: true
jwt: secret: ${JWT_SECRET:omnischool-secret-2024} expiration: 86400000 refresh-expiration: 604800000
app: cors: allowed-origins: http://localhost:5173,https://omnischool.tn
server: port: 8080

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>3.2.6</version> <relativePath/> </parent>
<groupId>com.omnischool</groupId> <artifactId>omnischool-backend</artifactId> <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version> <name>omnischool-backend</name> <description>OmniSchool Backend</description>
<properties> <java.version>17</java.version> <jjwt.version>0.11.5</jjwt.version> </properties>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-mail</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.postgresql</groupId> <artifactId>postgresql</artifactId> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId> <version>${jjwt.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId> <version>${jjwt.version}</version> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId> <version>${jjwt.version}</version> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <optional>true</optional> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
</project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>3.2.6</version> <relativePath/> </parent>
<groupId>com.omnischool</groupId> <artifactId>omnischool-backend</artifactId> <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version> <name>omnischool-backend</name> <description>OmniSchool Backend</description>
<properties> <java.version>17</java.version> <jjwt.version>0.11.5</jjwt.version> </properties>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-mail</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.postgresql</groupId> <artifactId>postgresql</artifactId> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <optional>true</optional> </dependency>
<!-- JWT Dependencies --> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId> <version>${jjwt.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId> <version>${jjwt.version}</version> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId> <version>${jjwt.version}</version> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.security</groupId> <artifactId>spring-security-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> <configuration> <excludes> <exclude> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> </exclude> </excludes> </configuration> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
</project>

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
spring: datasource: url: jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/omnischool username: ${DB_USERNAME:postgres} password: ${DB_PASSWORD:password} jpa: hibernate: ddl-auto: update show-sql: true properties: hibernate: dialect: org.postgresql.dialect.PostgreSQLDialect mail: host: smtp.gmail.com port: 587 username: ${EMAIL_USERNAME} password: ${EMAIL_PASSWORD} properties: mail: smtp: auth: true starttls: enable: true
jwt: secret: ${JWT_SECRET:omnischool-secret-2024} expiration: 86400000 refresh-expiration: 604800000
app: cors: allowed-origins: http://localhost:5173,https://omnischool.tn
